ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* County code */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the county belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the county */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population of the county */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "bachelor_degree" INTEGER /* Number of residents with a Bachelor's degree */,
  "grad_degree" INTEGER /* Number of residents with a Graduate degree */,
  "hs_grad" INTEGER /* Number of residents who are high school graduates */,
  "less_than_hs" INTEGER /* Number of residents with less than a high school education */,
  "school_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in schools */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the county */,
  "gdp_education" REAL /* GDP of the education sector */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* Major industries in the county */,
  "job_market_growth_rate" REAL /* Job market growth rate for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "death_total" INTEGER /* Total deaths in the county */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the county */,
  "leading_causes_of_death" TEXT /* Leading causes of death in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_area_data" (
  "land_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land area data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the county */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area of the county */,
  "coastal_area" REAL /* Coastal area of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_area_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_data" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "bike" REAL /* Percentage of residents who bike to work */,
  "carpool" REAL /* Percentage of residents who carpool to work */,
  "public_transportation" REAL /* Percentage of residents who use public transportation to work */,
  "commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "associates_degree_data" (
  "associates_degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each associates degree data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "associates_degree" INTEGER /* Number of residents with an Associate's degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the Associate's degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("associates_degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associates_degree_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_density_data" (
  "population_density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population density data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "urban_population_density" REAL /* Urban population density of the county */,
  "rural_population_density" REAL /* Rural population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_density_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., population, education, employment) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
